name: Steak and Mushroom Ragout
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook onion in oil in skillet until softened, 5 minutes.
2. Add mushrooms and garlic; cook until very tender, 5 minutes.
3. If needed, add broth, 1/4 cup at a time, to achieve desired consistency.
4. Stir in tomato, wine, olives, and remaining broth. Simmer, uncovered, for 10 minutes.
5. Add thyme; keep warm.
6. Heat nonstick skillet with cooking spray.
7. Season steaks with salt and pepper. Cook each side for 4 minutes to achieve medium-rare or desired doneness.
8. Remove steaks to platter. Spoon sauce over the steaks.
9. Garnish with watercress, if desired.
